channel.title: Data-Center on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Center on Archive 03

item.title: $700 Billion in AI CAPEX: Madness or a Historic Infrastructure Cycle?
item.description: Amazon $200B, Alphabet $180B, Meta $125B… Big Tech’s AI capital expenditure is exploding toward a combined $700 billion in 2026. We analyze whether this is a repeat of the dot-com bubble or the largest infrastructure cycle since the cloud.

item.title: Nuclear Energy ETFs: The Next AI Infrastructure Play?
item.description: As AI data centers demand gigawatt-level power, nuclear energy and uranium ETFs are back in the spotlight. We analyze the opportunities and risks of $URA and the nuclear value chain.
